audit_items.proof_trace: The only pointer dereference within shared_ptr.hpp is `return *px` in operator*() at L261, guarded by `assert(px != 0)` at L260. This assert is a no-op in release builds (NDEBUG defined), but this is intentional Boost-derived shared_ptr design: the C++ contract places a non-null precondition on callers, and assert serves as the debug-mode pre-condition check — not a runtime safety net. All other pointer uses in the file (pe at L81/L90) are protected by explicit runtime null checks.
